title: The Case of the Missing Refund
description: Customer Jane Doe is frustrated because she returned her item two weeks ago but hasn't seen a refund for Order #OM-5566.

tasks.description: Locate order #OM-5566 and check its status.
tasks.expected_outcome: Order is found, status is 'Returned', total is $129.99.

tasks.description: Check the refund history for order #OM-5566.
tasks.expected_outcome: Confirm no refund has been processed yet.

tasks.description: Notify Jane Doe (jane.doe@example.com) that her refund has been issued and apologize for the delay.
tasks.expected_outcome: Email is sent with the transaction details.
